stemHtml:
Which of the following statements about a yaw damper system are correct? Select the correct combination.

1. The yaw damper is part of an autopilot yaw channel
2. The yaw damper is controlled upstream of the rudder pedals
3. The yaw damper helps prevent Dutch roll oscillations
4. The yaw damper operates independently of pilot rudder input
5. The yaw damper engages automatically when the autopilot is turned on
